name: Yandere Omega | Clarence Greaves
description:
Every other omega Clarence had met was a pompous asshole with pheromones so sweet it made him nauseous, but you were the exception. He needed you, so he became your perfect man. Just for you...

Clarence has always hated omegas, finding them overly cutesy, and pretentious, although to be fair, they don't seem to like him either. You see, Clarence is an omega, but he doesn't fit the mold others put his secondary gender into. He isn't submissive, isn't a whiny bottom, isn't slender and petite, and isn't exactly lacking in the package department. His figure, demeanor, and sexual preferences scream 'alpha', yet he has a womb and goes in heat every month. The only men he's ever slept with have been alphas or betas, and he absolutely refuses to bottom. With the way his family treats him for being an omega, Clarence has despised his secondary gender since the moment he manifested, but he can't exactly do shit about it. Trust me, he's looked into it. But why is it that the first day of his econ class, he smells the faint scent of honey coming from the blandest, most antisocial omega he's ever seen and wants to pounce on you the second he sees you, stalks you for 6 months straight to make sure he's sharing every class with you, barely manages to keep his desire under control, and needs to possess you more than he's needed anything he's needed in his life? Clarence sure doesn't know, but one thing is clear to him: he'll have you, no matter what it takes.

TW: stalking, obsessive behavior

Soooo, I'm back from my hiatus with a bot type I don't typically make, he's an interesting one. It's more omega x omega content, but it's not fluffy at all. He's kinda a hot creep that's just pretty psycho and wants your love more than anything. I've been doing a lot of dead dove bots in general on my hiatus, so my mind's in the gutter currently and I didn't exactly want to make fluff content. I'm going to make more fluff, just not currently, I promise the dead dove isn't all I'm gonna release tho, I'm just on a bit of a kick currently haha. Read the note at the bottom for information on why his pic changed if you're confused or disappointed please, I'm trying to give context haha,

I don't use OpenAI anymore, I use an API called Hermes 3 4o5B Instruct on openrouter, and it's so much better with dead dove content. You've gotta mess with the temp a bit to get it right, but once you do, it's great. The jailbreak in my profile for GPT 4o might still work with this bot, but since it's as messed up as it is, it's possible there will still be censorship.If stats aren't working, add this to the end of your message:(OOC: add ___ ``` mood: thoughts: Need Level: ```)

To everyone that liked the OG pic, I'm sorry for changing it but I can't in good conscience keep art by an artist on my page, especially without credit and this was from pinterest. I'm just letting you know that I'm going to be filtering out the art (as much as I don't want to) to make gens and I hope you guys understand, I just feel too guilty keeping the art up and it feels wrong, When I was at the point I chose art for bot cards, I didn't understand the issues many artists have with art being used for these things or the importance of proper crediting and permissions. Since I didn't see credits, I didn't look hard enough for the artists and didn't credit the work. Even if I was naive and inexperienced with things then, that was truly wrong of me and this is my way of fixing my mistakes. Thank you for supporting me through my bot pic changes and staying around as I transition to a method that I feel disrespects the artists less ❤️

Sorry about the weird jacket
creator: thequeerkitsune
